# Chapter 7: Mass transfer and separation processes  (~110 pp)
- 7.1 Diffusion: Fick's laws and binary diffusion (15) · 7.2 Convective mass transfer and the heat-mass transfer analogy (15) · 7.3 Mass-transfer coefficients in design (12) · 7.4 Distillation: trays, packing, HETP, McCabe-Thiele (15) · 7.5 Absorption, extraction, adsorption (15) · 7.6 Membrane processes: RO, UF, MF, gas separation (15) · 7.7 Drying, crystallisation, leaching (12) · 7.8 Failure section: separation breakthroughs, fouling, channelling, equilibrium-stage failures (11)

**Archetype**: balance, transport, scaling. **Project**: distil ethanol from a fermented sample; characterise the column's HETP. **Exercises**: 30.
